narrative:
category_one_description: The applicant is seeking competitive bids for Category 1 Internet access services, including dedicated fiber connectivity with associated installation and activation, as described in the posted RFP. All bids will be evaluated in accordance with FCC and USAC competitive bidding rules, with price of eligible services as the primary factor.
